title: Joeji's Kitchen Universal Knife Block Without Knives with Extra Slots for Scissors & Sharpening Rod, Rustproof Stainless Steel Kitchen Knife Holder
features: High Compatibility - Better than knife blocks with fixed slots, you can store varied sizes of knives with our universal knife organiser. From utility knives to meat cleavers, any blade of up to 21cm length & 8.5cm width can fit this knife stand.

Space-savvy Knife Storage - Compact in size but offers impressive capacity. Depending on each blade's size, this knife block set features wavy slits for up to 14 knives. Its unique design has 2 extra slots for kitchen scissors & a sharpening rod.

Hygienic & Safe - More sanitary than a wooden tower knife block that's prone to mould build-up & gunk accumulation. Our kitchen knife block comes with a drain hole at its stable weighted base to keep contents dry & odour-free after washing.

Stylishly Tough - This metallic knife holder boasts a chic, modern design that will look brand new for longer. Its stainless steel body reinforces the grey knife block with strong resistance to rust, scratches, & fingerprints.

100% Guarantee - We offer a 100% guarantee on our knife sharpening block, kitchen knives sets with block, knife block set with knives, knife and fork holder & all products. If you're not satisfied with any knive block or any item please contact us.
description: Product Description Previous page Next page 1 WIDE CLEAVER KNIVES 2 SLIM FILLET KNIVES 3 BULKY SCISSORS 4 REGULAR CHEF'S KNIVES MORE REASONS TO LOVE THIS PRODUCT VERSATILE DESIGN that complements most kitchen styles from modern minimalists to extravagant luxury kitchens. DRIES YOUR KNIVES QUICKLY Its weighted base has adequate drain holes that allow your knives to dry quickly while suspended upside-down inside the knife block. LOW MAINTENANCE Rust-resistant and hygienic, this knife block won't need much attention in cleaning and maintenance. EASY TO CLEAN Can be tossed in the dishwasher or washed by hand with ease by removing the top cover to access it's interior. How many knives can it hold? Unlike other knife blocks with preallocated slit sizes, this knife block has a non-restrictive slit size to accommodate all sizes of knives and can fit up to 14 knives altogether. Is it the best way to store knives? Aside from it being space-saving, it allows knives to air dry within its hollow interior where knives are suspended upside down not in contact to any surface. What kinds of knives can it hold? From utility knives to meat cleavers, any blade of up to 21cm length & 8.5cm width can fit this knife stand.
